text: Bhuvneshwar Kumar is 1 wicket away from becoming the second to reach 200 wickets
Sameer Rizvi currently leads the Orange Cap race with 160 runs for Delhi
Uncapped Jacob Duffy leads the Purple Cap race after Royal Challengers' win
CSK face their worst start in history after losing three consecutive matches
Virat Kohli extends his all-time IPL scoring lead to 8,740 career runs
Mumbai Indians hold a slim 16-14 historical advantage over Rajasthan Royals
Rajasthan Royals can take the top spot in the table with a win over Mumbai
Rohit Sharma enters tonight's match as the third-highest scorer of IPL 2026
Sandeep Sharma needs 3 wickets to reach 150 career IPL wickets
Sunil Narine needs 7 wickets to reach 200 career IPL wickets
